`
## Spring Boot集成

### 引入依赖

```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.ctdi.sdk</groupId>
    <artifactId>keycloak-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
</dependency>
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
</dependency>
```
### 配置 application.yml

```yaml
keycloak:
  realm-url: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/master
  client-id: client-id-test
  client-secret: client-secret-test
  redirect-uri: http://127.0.0.1:8004/sso/callback
```
### 在业务代码中使用

```java
package com.ctdi.sdk.demo;

import com.ibingbo.sdk.keycloak.client.KeycloakClient;
import jakarta.annotation.Resource;
import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;

import java.io.IOException;

@SpringBootApplication
@RestController
public class DemoApplication {

    @Resource
    private KeycloakClient keycloakClient;

    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException, InterruptedException {
        SpringApplication.run(DemoApplication.class, args);
    }

    @GetMapping("/login/url")
    public Object loginUrl() {
        return this.keycloakClient.authorizationUrl("state", "nonce");
    }
    
    @GetMapping("/token/exchange") 
    public String exchange(@RequestParam("code") String code) throws Exception {
        TokenResponse response = this.keycloakClient.exchangeCode(code);
        log.info("token response: {}", response);
        return response.getAccessToken();
    }
    
    @GetMapping("/user/get") 
    public Map<String, Object> userInfo(@RequestParam("token") String token) throws Exception {
        return this.keycloakClient.userInfo(token);
    }
}
```
